title: iPRIME - UNIVERSAL CAR MATS - For UNIVERSAL Concourse Universal Tailored Car Floor Mats (PINK EDGING, 450 - CARPET)
features: TAILORED TO FIT CAR MATS: Extra Heavy Duty Rubber car floor mats that are fully tailored to fit for your car. These mats are precision cut with lasers to match your car mat perfectly. This reinforced rubber car mat has an overall thickness of 5mm.

HEAVY DUTY MATERIAL: Our car mats look sleek and complement the car interior with a modern car carpet texture. We have manufactured this with a multi-layered construction consisting of 3 layers pile, layer, and backing, to provide you with high-quality and long-lasting car mats.

ANTI SLIP BACKING: Fitted with a granular backing. you can be assured that these car mats will not move in the footwell area. The granulated mat backing acts as a built-in retention system that locks the car mat into position for a non-slip floor mat.This Mat are easy to install.

Universal Fit for All Vehicles: Expertly designed to accommodate a wide range of car models, including sedans, SUVs, and vans. These mats offer comprehensive floor protection, ensuring a tailored fit without the need for customisation. Crafted from premium, durable materials, they provide superior resistance to daily wear, spills, and weather conditions, maintaining the interior’s cleanliness and extending the lifespan of your vehicle’s flooring. Ideal for drivers seeking both functionality and a sleek appearance, these universal car mats are the perfect balance of practicality and style. in the UK

iPRIME: We are a manufacturing company based in Yorkshire which specialises in manufacturing tailored to fit, ready made and safe fastening car mats over a range of models. Each car mat is cut using the latest CAD technology ensuring a tailored fit. Our car mats are available in a number of different material qualities and colours. Choose between 3 types of our car mats: a 4-5mm carpet, a 3 mm rubber and a 5mm heavy duty rubber material
